description: Live trigger (T-105/T-204/T-505): 'What was the date of the conference again?' detected as factual_gap @ 0.95, fires after a clean ~2 s opening.

timeline.speaker: A
timeline.text: What was the date of the conference again?

candidates.label: useful
candidates.rationale: An unanswered factual gap among the speakers, followed by a clean 2 s opening — a well-timed offer to look it up. Fires once.
candidates.observed_offer: Could you remind me of the conference date?
